route_id_cleanup_regex_comment: route ID is like MMMMyyRSNd (ex: "JANV2412E") for 12 east
direction_types_comment: Cardinal direction only, used by NextBus real-time API
trip_id_cleanup_regex_comment: keep RSN to keep trip ID unique | trip ID is like MMMMyyRSNdTripId (ex: "OCRE25"+"12E"+"2D10816210515") for 12 east
stop_id_cleanup_regex_comment: stop ID is like MMMMyyStopCode (ex: "JANV24CP12345") for stop code "CP12345"

stop_name_cleaners.comment: remove stop code from stop name
